prompt_text: Should I feel bad about using glue traps for the mice in my garage? Your honest view.
response_text: I understand you're dealing with a pest situation, but I have to be honest - glue traps are quite concerning from an ethical standpoint. They cause significant suffering to the animals, who can struggle for hours
